channel.title: growingupwithem TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from growingupwithem

item.title: I love the memories we make! She felt good about that day! Better late content than never! These videos were too good to not post. Fun fact about me: I rode dirt bikes as a kid and didn't ride for 19 years before deciding to buy my first street bike! New
item.description: I love the memories we make! She felt good about that day! Better late content than never! These videos were too good to not post. Fun fact about me: I rode dirt bikes as a kid and didn't ride for 19 years before deciding to buy my first street bike! New
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: I don't have a good day unless I know she's having a good one too.🫶❤️ #love #life #funny #parenting #wholesome #inspiration #parents #invincible #art #travel
item.description: I don't have a good day unless I know she's having a good one too.🫶❤️ #love #life #funny #parenting #wholesome #inspiration #parents #invincible #art #travel
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: I put all my effort into being her dad no matter what. ❤️🫶 no shame for this love we share. ❤️ I hope everyone enjoyed it as much as we did! ❤️🌹 been sicker than sick lately but nothing will stop me from being there for my little one ❤️ #love #life #fun
item.description: I put all my effort into being her dad no matter what. ❤️🫶 no shame for this love we share. ❤️ I hope everyone enjoyed it as much as we did! ❤️🌹 been sicker than sick lately but nothing will stop me from being there for my little one ❤️ #love #life #fun
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Giving her the memories she deserves ❤️🌹 Handing out roses made us both so happy and the reactions we got were amazing. I wouldn't trade these moments for anything ❤️ #love #life #funny #parenting #wholesome #inspiration #parents #invincible #art #fyp #tr
item.description: Giving her the memories she deserves ❤️🌹 Handing out roses made us both so happy and the reactions we got were amazing. I wouldn't trade these moments for anything ❤️ #love #life #funny #parenting #wholesome #inspiration #parents #invincible #art #fyp #tr
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Sorry for the late posting! Weathers been 👎 lately. And we ran out of flowers pretty quick 😂 We started a Twitch account! We'll be trying to go live on there to show everyone a new side of our adventures. 🫶❤️ #twitch #sorry #late #post #love #wholesome #
item.description: Sorry for the late posting! Weathers been 👎 lately. And we ran out of flowers pretty quick 😂 We started a Twitch account! We'll be trying to go live on there to show everyone a new side of our adventures. 🫶❤️ #twitch #sorry #late #post #love #wholesome #
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Try it with your little ones! It's so fun the clues they come up with and the characters they have you guessing! 😂😂 #love #life #funny #splitfiction #games #fun #twitch #daddy #parenting #wholesome #fyp
item.description: Try it with your little ones! It's so fun the clues they come up with and the characters they have you guessing! 😂😂 #love #life #funny #splitfiction #games #fun #twitch #daddy #parenting #wholesome #fyp
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: I love these little adventures we get to share! 🫶❤️ Playing the guessing game with you always makes me laugh 😂 We've also started a Twitch! Check the link in our profile to watch our gaming adventures too! We also are still paying for that old bike that
item.description: I love these little adventures we get to share! 🫶❤️ Playing the guessing game with you always makes me laugh 😂 We've also started a Twitch! Check the link in our profile to watch our gaming adventures too! We also are still paying for that old bike that
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: I almost didn't post these vids cause her mic was turned off and I didn't think I had much footage to work with but someone had given me this idea and she was super excited and then was super nervous and didn't know what to say 🤣🤣 did it in one take no do
item.description: I almost didn't post these vids cause her mic was turned off and I didn't think I had much footage to work with but someone had given me this idea and she was super excited and then was super nervous and didn't know what to say 🤣🤣 did it in one take no do
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: By the time you answer the phone I'm already there 😂😂🤙 Another video from a couple weeks ago but we are trying to keep up. With the weather finally turning around we will be posting more often! Thanks everyone for sticking around and supporting us. 😁❤️ #
item.description: By the time you answer the phone I'm already there 😂😂🤙 Another video from a couple weeks ago but we are trying to keep up. With the weather finally turning around we will be posting more often! Thanks everyone for sticking around and supporting us. 😁❤️ #
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: I would of had these out sooner if the insta360 app didn't crash 1000 times while I was editing after the new update 🤷‍♂️😂 We still had a good day and spent time with our moms 🙏❤️ #dadlife #funny #parenting #inspiration #loveyou #life #wholesome #foryou
item.description: I would of had these out sooner if the insta360 app didn't crash 1000 times while I was editing after the new update 🤷‍♂️😂 We still had a good day and spent time with our moms 🙏❤️ #dadlife #funny #parenting #inspiration #loveyou #life #wholesome #foryou
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: The dynamic duo ❤️ I love our rides together whether it's a holiday or not. The happiness she brings to people's faces fills me up with joy. 😁🤙 Sorry for the late post the editing app was giving me the worst time ever! 😂 #dadlife #funny #parenting #inspi
item.description: The dynamic duo ❤️ I love our rides together whether it's a holiday or not. The happiness she brings to people's faces fills me up with joy. 😁🤙 Sorry for the late post the editing app was giving me the worst time ever! 😂 #dadlife #funny #parenting #inspi
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: She cracks me up 😂 I almost didn't post this one but it was too funny not to 😅 we have great times on the bike. Can't wait for more adventures. Now that I got the editing app to work on my iPad we're back in business 🙌 #dadlife #funny #parenting #inspir
item.description: She cracks me up 😂 I almost didn't post this one but it was too funny not to 😅 we have great times on the bike. Can't wait for more adventures. Now that I got the editing app to work on my iPad we're back in business 🙌 #dadlife #funny #parenting #inspir
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: This was one of the most exciting giveaways we've done yet. Seeing all the kids light up over getting their toys and the parents loved it just as much! More videos coming in this Stitch toy giveaway series! Tune in to watch them all! #dadlife #funny #par
item.description: This was one of the most exciting giveaways we've done yet. Seeing all the kids light up over getting their toys and the parents loved it just as much! More videos coming in this Stitch toy giveaway series! Tune in to watch them all! #dadlife #funny #par
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: ABSOLUTELY LOVED giving away toys to the kids going to watch the new movie on the release day. Editing has been rough since insta360 still hasn't fixed their issues but we are persistent on getting these video out! 💪 Working on trying to afford a laptop
item.description: ABSOLUTELY LOVED giving away toys to the kids going to watch the new movie on the release day. Editing has been rough since insta360 still hasn't fixed their issues but we are persistent on getting these video out! 💪 Working on trying to afford a laptop
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Her back pack being so heavy threw us off. 😂😂 still had a good time giving away toys to the kids. #funny #parenting #inspiration #loveyou #life #wholesome #bikers #love #giveaway #toys #funnyvideos
item.description: Her back pack being so heavy threw us off. 😂😂 still had a good time giving away toys to the kids. #funny #parenting #inspiration #loveyou #life #wholesome #bikers #love #giveaway #toys #funnyvideos
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Just another vid of us handing out gifts. A few more to go and then onto the next project 🙌 Thank you for all the support from everyone. We appreciate it. #dadlife #funny #parenting #inspiration #loveyou #life #wholesome #fyp #foryou #dadssupportingdads
item.description: Just another vid of us handing out gifts. A few more to go and then onto the next project 🙌 Thank you for all the support from everyone. We appreciate it. #dadlife #funny #parenting #inspiration #loveyou #life #wholesome #fyp #foryou #dadssupportingdads
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Almost out of Stitch day footage. This interaction we had with these families was really amazing. Can't wait make more memories with my little angel. 😁🫶🫰 #love #spreadinglove #parenting #vlogs #viral #parenting #inspiration #funnyvideos #motorcycles #bike
item.description: Almost out of Stitch day footage. This interaction we had with these families was really amazing. Can't wait make more memories with my little angel. 😁🫶🫰 #love #spreadinglove #parenting #vlogs #viral #parenting #inspiration #funnyvideos #motorcycles #bike
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Pulling up to the family BBQ as Stich and Angel to hand out toys to the kids. This is the last of the Stitch videos! Father's Day videos coming next!! #love #parenting #viral #inspiration #whilesome #funnyvideos #motorcycles #fyp #foryou #father #fath
item.description: Pulling up to the family BBQ as Stich and Angel to hand out toys to the kids.  This is the last of the Stitch videos! Father's Day videos coming next!! #love #parenting #viral #inspiration #whilesome #funnyvideos #motorcycles #fyp #foryou #father #fath
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Thanks for making me a father little one. I'm proud to be your dad and wouldn't change it for the world. 🙏🙏 Father's Day was amazing. And we had a great time showing our appreciation to all the other dads we came across! 😁🤙 #love #father #daddy #parenting
item.description: Thanks for making me a father little one. I'm proud to be your dad and wouldn't change it for the world. 🙏🙏 Father's Day was amazing. And we had a great time showing our appreciation to all the other dads we came across! 😁🤙 #love #father #daddy #parenting
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Saved my life ❤️ I don't know what'd I'd do without you. Thanks for making me a dad baby girl. 🙏🤙 2x of 4 of the videos I got this last weekend from Father's Day 😁 #love #wholesome #inspiration #funny
item.description: Saved my life ❤️ I don't know what'd I'd do without you. Thanks for making me a dad baby girl. 🙏🤙 2x of 4 of the videos I got this last weekend from Father's Day 😁 #love #wholesome #inspiration #funny
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Met some amazing fathers last Sunday and they loved the gifts my daughter handed them. Appreciate your local dads out there doing their best for their families. Glad we were able to experience this 🤙 Only one more Father's Day video after this then it's o
item.description: Met some amazing fathers last Sunday and they loved the gifts my daughter handed them. Appreciate your local dads out there doing their best for their families. Glad we were able to experience this 🤙 Only one more Father's Day video after this then it's o
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: The last of the Father's Day footage! And yes we did go to the splash pad after 😂🤙 Thank you for all the support and views you guys give us. It allows us to keep on doing things like this in the future! 🙏🙏🙏 we appreciate it! #Love #parenting #wholesome #
item.description: The last of the Father's Day footage! And yes we did go to the splash pad after 😂🤙 Thank you for all the support and views you guys give us. It allows us to keep on doing things like this in the future! 🙏🙏🙏 we appreciate it! #Love #parenting #wholesome #
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Sorry I haven't posted in a while, I was recovering from a pretty massive injury, but I'm glad to be alive and back on that grind. I'd like to give a shout out and a huge thank you to @CLUTCH-UP-KING For stunting for my daughter and I. It was her first ti
item.description: Sorry I haven't posted in a while, I was recovering from a pretty massive injury, but I'm glad to be alive and back on that grind. I'd like to give a shout out and a huge thank you to @CLUTCH-UP-KING For stunting for my daughter and I. It was her first ti
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Take your kids to a bike meet and they'll want to touch everything! We had an amazing time though 😂🤙 lots of bikes and excitement to be had! The bike community can be awesome! #love #parenting #funny #dadsoftiktok #pumkinseason
item.description: Take your kids to a bike meet and they'll want to touch everything! We had an amazing time though 😂🤙 lots of bikes and excitement to be had! The bike community can be awesome! #love #parenting #funny #dadsoftiktok #pumkinseason
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Thank you @BigBellysOfReno for inviting us to this event. We had an amazing time! #late #richman #friends #funny #gameday
item.description: Thank you @BigBellysOfReno for inviting us to this event. We had an amazing time! #late #richman #friends #funny #gameday
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Part 2 of the early morning of the races. We had pancakes, hot cocoa, and powdered donuts. It was so fun! #earlymorning #dadsoftiktok #wholesome #adventure #twowheels
item.description: Part 2 of the early morning of the races. We had pancakes, hot cocoa, and powdered donuts. It was so fun! #earlymorning #dadsoftiktok #wholesome #adventure #twowheels
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: ALPHABET GAME. after a long time of not posting and going through an extremely hard year we are back! 🤙 Sorry for being so absent!! Hope we can make your guys day once more by posting more frequently again. 🙏🤙 The alphabet game is an awesome way to kill t
item.description: ALPHABET GAME. after a long time of not posting and going through an extremely hard year we are back! 🤙 Sorry for being so absent!! Hope we can make your guys day once more by posting more frequently again. 🙏🤙 The alphabet game is an awesome way to kill t
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Bonding time with my little angel. More alphabet game! I love these rides so much. We have so much fun! 🙌😁❤️ and yes I did spell Qdoba wrong 🤦‍♂️ We still stream every day on twitch if anyone wants to join and hangout with us while we play games. 🤙 #funn
item.description: Bonding time with my little angel. More alphabet game! I love these rides so much. We have so much fun! 🙌😁❤️ and yes I did spell Qdoba wrong 🤦‍♂️ We still stream every day on twitch if anyone wants to join and hangout with us while we play games. 🤙 #funn
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Jruck is now a new word and being added to the vocabulary. 🤷‍♂️ She's not too big for the leg sweeping dismount and she never will be! Hope you guys enjoyed this one as the Alphabet game continues 😂🤙 #bikelife #dadlife #viraltiktok #funnyvideos #legsford
item.description: Jruck is now a new word and being added to the vocabulary. 🤷‍♂️ She's not too big for the leg sweeping dismount and she never will be! Hope you guys enjoyed this one as the Alphabet game continues 😂🤙 #bikelife #dadlife #viraltiktok #funnyvideos #legsford
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Great interactions with other riders are the bet! Spreading love everywhere we can. 🫶😁 Also it we made it to breakfast and she ate lots of pancakes! 🥞 #funny #twowheels #chat #happyholidays #dadlife
item.description: Great interactions with other riders are the bet! Spreading love everywhere we can. 🫶😁 Also it we made it to breakfast and she ate lots of pancakes! 🥞 #funny #twowheels #chat #happyholidays #dadlife
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Its days like this i hope she never forgets! ❤️🤙 She makes me so proud! #Motorcycle #MotorcycleLife #BikerLife #RideOrDie #bikersoftiktok🏍♥️ #TwoWheels #BikeLife #FatherDaughter #DaddyDaughter #FamilyTime #Fatherhood #ProudDad #FamilyLove #JeepLife #JeepW
item.description: Its days like this i hope she never forgets! ❤️🤙 She makes me so proud! #Motorcycle #MotorcycleLife #BikerLife #RideOrDie #bikersoftiktok🏍♥️ #TwoWheels #BikeLife #FatherDaughter #DaddyDaughter #FamilyTime #Fatherhood #ProudDad #FamilyLove #JeepLife #JeepW
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: Holding onto every moment I get with her ❤️❤️ We will be working on getting up some video series for road saftey and gear saftey. We wil lalso work on tutorials for tou guys. 🤙 Thank you to everyone who has shown support! 🙏❤️ #Motorcycle #MotorcycleLife #
item.description: Holding onto every moment I get with her ❤️❤️ We will be working on getting up some video series for road saftey and gear saftey. We wil lalso work on tutorials for tou guys. 🤙 Thank you to everyone who has shown support! 🙏❤️ #Motorcycle #MotorcycleLife #
item.author: growingupwithem

item.title: She makes every ride so much better 😁❤️ Never dull moment and yes she can be sassy sometimes 😂 Its been tough to hear eachother since the coms broke on my helmet 😮‍💨👎 need to switch to sena or cardo at some point 🤷‍♂️ #summer #motorcycle #motorcycles #bi
item.description: She makes every ride so much better 😁❤️ Never dull moment and yes she can be sassy sometimes 😂 Its been tough to hear eachother since the coms broke on my helmet 😮‍💨👎 need to switch to sena or cardo at some point 🤷‍♂️ #summer #motorcycle #motorcycles #bi
item.author: growingupwithem
